label: Payment Services webhook handler

provisioning.label: Payment Services
provisioning.help: Onboard Payment Services + a merchant account. https://experienceleague.adobe.com/en/docs/commerce-merchant-services/payment-services

postNote: Expose as a web action (web: true). VERIFY the provider signature before processing (commerce-saas/payment-webhook-verify); keep the signing secret in .env, never inline.
